_comment: Template merged into ~/.claude/settings.json by scripts/install-hooks.sh. Each Claude terminal POSTs lifecycle events to the local Hivemind hooks server so the Monitor gets precise, low-latency done/permission signals (vs screen scraping). @PORT@ is replaced with hooks.port from config. $HIVEMIND_TERM is exported per tmux session (see adapters/tmux.py) so events carry the terminal name.
